mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lab_device ORDER BY device_id
SELECT * FROM lab_device WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lab_device ( device_id, device_name, device_code, category, status, location, image_url, description ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{deviceName}, #{deviceCode}, #{category}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{location}, #{imageUrl}, #{description} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE device_name = VALUES(device_name), device_code = VALUES(device_code), category = VALUES(category), status = VALUES(status), location = VALUES(location), image_url = VALUES(image_url), description = VALUES(description)
